raw_consumer_statement:
I am a XXXX victim of severe elder financial exploitation and identity theft. My granddaughter fraudulently used my Citibank credit card without my permission and without being an authorized user, racking up thousands of dollars in unauthorized charges. We have discovered this crime and have actively filed charges with law enforcement. The police report case number is Arkansas 66FCR-26-269. I have attempted to contact Citibank 's fraud department repeatedly by phone, but the automated system prevents me from reaching a human representative. Because a massive past-due balance is currently facing a deadline, I need Citibanks Executive Fraud Unit to freeze this fraudulent balance immediately, halt any negative credit reporting, and contact me or my advocate to resolve this. You can reach me by phone at XXXX. 

Thank you XXXX XXXX Account ending in XXXX
